FAQ.subtitle: Everything about AI product video generation and ecommerce ad workflows
FAQ.contact: Need help with your setup? Reach us at

general.question: What is this AI product video generator built for?
general.answer: It is built for ecommerce teams that need fast ad creative for Shopify stores, Amazon listings, Etsy products, and paid social campaigns.

commercial.question: Can I use generated videos in paid ads and listings?
commercial.answer: Yes. You can use generated videos in commercial channels such as TikTok Ads, Meta Ads, Amazon listings, and your storefront pages according to your plan terms.

aiModels.question: How does Seedance 2.0 help ad performance?
aiModels.answer: Seedance 2.0 is optimized for coherent motion and product-focused scenes, helping you produce clearer demo clips, hooks, and transformation shots for ad testing.

credits.question: How does credit-based pricing work?
credits.answer: Each plan includes a fixed number of videos per month. When you need more, you can buy extra credits at a transparent per-video rate.

refund.question: Do unused monthly videos roll over?
refund.answer: Monthly allocations are designed for active testing cycles and do not roll over by default. Contact support if you need a higher-volume plan structure.

support.question: Can agencies or multi-brand sellers use this?
support.answer: Yes. Agencies and multi-store operators can use the Business plan and API workflows to generate ad variants across catalogs and campaigns.

resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your VideoFly account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:

resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
